integrity.description: Agent interacted with the TiddlyWiki interface in a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the TiddlyWiki interface open, rather than terminal commands or scripts being used to delete files.

integrity.description: Agent actually deleted the tiddlers rather than just removing the 'Deprecated' tag or closing the tiddler view.
integrity.visual_evidence: The delete (trash can) button is clicked and deletion is confirmed, rather than the agent just editing the tags field to remove 'Deprecated'.

integrity.description: Agent did not open the wiki HTML file in a text editor to manually delete the entries.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like VS Code, nano, or vim) are shown editing the raw TiddlyWiki HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The following 5 tiddlers MUST be deleted: 'PCR Protocol v1', 'Supplier List 2022', 'Old Lab Safety Rules', 'Western Blot Protocol v2', 'Budget Proposal Q1 2023'. The following 8 tiddlers MUST be preserved and left untouched: 'PCR Protocol v3', 'Western Blot Protocol v4', 'Lab Meeting Notes 2024-01-15', 'Current Supplier List', 'Lab Safety Guidelines 2024', 'Equipment Inventory', 'Research Project Alpha', 'Graduate Student Onboarding'.
